hooks.command: echo 'peepshow available: turn videos + animated images into timelines of frames. Trigger: user shares .mp4/.mov/.mkv/.webm/.avi/.flv/.wmv/.ts/.mts/.m2ts/.3gp/.ogv/.gif/.apng (do NOT fire for static png/jpg). Invoke: peepshow "<path>" --emit json. Parse frames[].path ordered + video.tags for grounding. After reading frames, annotate the auto-generated report so the next viewer sees your synthesis: echo {"summary":...} | peepshow report annotate "$outputDir". npm i -g peepshow (https://www.npmjs.com/package/peepshow).'
